use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics with trend indicators for SaaS dashboards
Showing business KPIs like team activation rates, automation counts, and NPS scores
Presenting real-time analytics snapshots in fintech applications
Creating metric overview sections for project management tools
Building analytics summary blocks for B2B software landing pages
ai_summary: A glassmorphism-styled metrics display component featuring four key performance indicators with trend deltas, animated fade-up entrance effects on scroll, and soft blur orbs creating depth. Built with Framer Motion for viewport-triggered animations and shadcn/ui primitives for consistent styling. Ideal for SaaS dashboards and fintech analytics sections needing a modern, translucent aesthetic with clear data visualization.
